# CTEM — Continuous Threat Exposure Management

> **Generated:** 2026-04-28T11:41:10Z
> **Endpoint count:** 1860
> **Tags:** `CTEM`, `Threat Intelligence`, `Incident Response`, `SOAR`, `XDR`, `Attack Simulation`

## Overview

Endpoints covering threat intelligence, attack path analysis, incident response, SOAR playbooks, breach simulation, phishing simulation, EDR/XDR integrations, SIEM connectors, threat hunting, MPTE orchestration, anomaly detection (ML/UEBA), and purple/red team management.

## Authentication

All endpoints (unless marked **Public**) require:

```
X-API-Key: <your-api-token>
```

Tokens are managed via **Admin > API Tokens** in the UI or `POST /api/v1/auth/token`.

Some endpoints require additional OAuth2-style scopes (`read:findings`, `write:findings`, `admin:all`).
The required scope is noted in each endpoint's **Auth** field.

## Error Response Format

All error responses follow:

```json
{
  "detail": "Human-readable error message",
  "error_code": "MACHINE_READABLE_CODE",
  "request_id": "uuid-v4"
}
```

## Pagination

List endpoints that support pagination accept:

| Parameter | Type | Default | Description |
|-----------|------|---------|-------------|
| `page` | integer | 1 | 1-based page number |
| `page_size` | integer | 50 | Items per page (max 500) |
| `cursor` | string | — | Cursor token for cursor-based pagination |

Paginated responses include:

```json
{
  "items": [...],
  "total": 1234,
  "page": 1,
  "page_size": 50,
  "next_cursor": "opaque-token"
}
```

---

## Endpoints


### 1. `POST` `/api/v1/threat-intel/correlate`

**Summary:** POST /api/v1/threat-intel/correlate

**Tags:** threat-intel

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Correlate a single security finding against all known threat actors and campaigns. Returns the best-
matching ThreatCorrelation.

**Request Body:** `CorrelateRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `finding` | Dict | Yes |  |  |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `ThreatCorrelation`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `finding_id` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `threat_actor` | Optional | No | None |  |
| `campaign` | Optional | No | None |  |
| `confidence` | float | No | 0.0 |  |
| `ioc_matches` | List | No | PydanticUndefined |  |
| `ttp_matches` | List | No | PydanticUndefined |  |

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

---

### 2. `POST` `/api/v1/threat-intel/correlate/batch`

**Summary:** POST /api/v1/threat-intel/correlate/batch

**Tags:** threat-intel

### 10. `GET` `/api/v1/threat-intel/cves/recent`

**Summary:** GET /api/v1/threat-intel/cves/recent

**Tags:** threat-intel

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Return the most recently cached CVEs enriched with EPSS scores.  CVEs are served from the local
SQLite cache. Call ``/refresh`` to pull the latest data from NVD / EPSS / CISA KEV.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Notes |
|------|----|------|----------|-------|
| `limit` | query | int | No | Max CVEs to return |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `List`

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

**Summary:** GET /api/v1/threat-intel/kev

**Tags:** threat-intel

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Return the current CISA Known Exploited Vulnerabilities catalog from cache.  The catalog is
refreshed on each call to ``/refresh``.

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `Dict`

**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)

### 12. `POST` `/api/v1/threat-intel/refresh`

**Summary:** POST /api/v1/threat-intel/refresh

**Tags:** threat-intel

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Trigger a fresh pull from NVD, EPSS, and CISA KEV.  This is a synchronous operation — it blocks
until all feeds are fetched and cached. For large date ranges this may take up to 60 seconds due to
NVD rate limits.

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `Dict`

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

---

### 13. `GET` `/api/v1/threat-intel/iocs`

**Summary:** GET /api/v1/threat-intel/iocs

**Tags:** threat-intel

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

List/search IOCs from local feed caches.  Currently returns C2 IPs from the Feodo blocklist.
Supports optional substring search and type filtering.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Notes |
|------|----|------|----------|-------|
| `ioc_type` | query | Optional | No | Filter by type: ip\|domain\|hash\|url |
| `search` | query | Optional | No | Substring search on IOC value |
| `limit` | query | int | No | 100 |
| `offset` | query | int | No | 0 |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `Dict`

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

### 14. `POST` `/api/v1/threat-intel/iocs/lookup`

**Summary:** POST /api/v1/threat-intel/iocs/lookup

**Tags:** threat-intel

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Lookup a specific IOC value across all available feeds.  Checks: Feodo C2 blocklist (IPs), CISA KEV
(CVE IDs). Returns all matching feed hits plus auto-detected IOC type.

**Request Body:** `IOCLookupRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `value` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `ioc_type` | Optional | No | None |  |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `Dict`

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

### 20. `GET` `/api/v1/threat-intel/geo/{ip}`

**Summary:** GET /api/v1/threat-intel/geo/{ip}

**Tags:** threat-intel

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Return geo/ASN/reputation data for an IP address.  Uses Shodan InternetDB (no auth required) for
open port/vuln data. Also checks AbuseIPDB if ABUSEIPDB_API_KEY is configured. Checks Feodo C2
blocklist for C2 classification.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Notes |
|------|----|------|----------|-------|
| `ip` | path | str | Yes | — |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `Dict`

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

### 21. `POST` `/api/v1/correlations/analyze`

**Summary:** Run correlation on provided findings

**Tags:** correlations

**Auth:** API Key required

**Description:**

Run all correlation strategies on the supplied findings list.  Optionally also builds and persists
Exposure Cases from the correlations.

**Request Body:** `AnalyzeRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `findings` | List | Yes |  | List of finding dicts to correlate |
| `org_id` | str | No |  | Tenant / org identifier |
| `build_cases` | bool | No | True | Also build and persist Exposure Cases |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `Dict`

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

### 26. `POST` `/api/v1/soar/playbooks`

**Summary:** Create a new SOAR playbook

**Tags:** soar

**Auth:** API Key required

**Description:**

Define an automated response playbook.  The playbook will fire when an event matching `trigger` (and
optional `conditions`) is submitted to the /trigger endpoint.

**Request Body:** `CreatePlaybookRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `name` | str | Yes |  | Human-readable playbook name |
| `trigger` | PlaybookTrigger | Yes |  | Event type that fires this playbook |
| `actions` | List | Yes |  | Ordered list of action definitions |
| `conditions` | Dict | No | PydanticUndefined | Optional key/value conditions that must match the event |
| `enabled` | bool | No | True | Whether the playbook is active |
| `org_id` | str | No | default | Organisation ID |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `SOARPlaybook`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | str | No | PydanticUndefined |  |
| `name` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `trigger` | PlaybookTrigger | Yes |  |  |
| `conditions` | Dict | No | PydanticUndefined |  |
| `actions` | List | No | PydanticUndefined |  |
| `enabled` | bool | No | True |  |
| `execution_count` | int | No | 0 |  |
| `avg_response_seconds` | float | No | 0.0 |  |
| `org_id` | str | No | default |  |
| `created_at` | datetime | No | PydanticUndefined |  |
| `updated_at` | datetime | No | PydanticUndefined |  |

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

---

### 29. `POST` `/api/v1/soar/trigger`

**Summary:** Evaluate an event and fire matching playbooks

**Tags:** soar

**Auth:** API Key required

**Description:**

Submit a security event for automated response.  Matches the event against all enabled playbooks
with the given trigger type and condition set. Returns execution records for every playbook that
fired.

**Request Body:** `TriggerEventRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `trigger` | PlaybookTrigger | Yes |  | Event trigger type |
| `org_id` | str | No | default | Organisation ID |
| `event_data` | Dict | No | PydanticUndefined | Additional event context |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `List`

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

---

### 30. `POST` `/api/v1/soar/playbooks/{playbook_id}/execute`

**Summary:** Manually execute a SOAR playbook

**Tags:** soar

**Auth:** API Key required

**Description:**

Run a playbook immediately, bypassing trigger/condition evaluation.  Useful for manual incident
response or testing playbook actions. Returns 404 if the playbook does not exist, 422 if it is
disabled.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Notes |
|------|----|------|----------|-------|
| `playbook_id` | path | str | Yes | — |

**Request Body:** `ExecutePlaybookRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `context` | Dict | No | PydanticUndefined | Execution context passed to actions |
| `org_id` | str | No | default | Organisation ID |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `SOARExecution`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | str | No | PydanticUndefined |  |
| `playbook_id` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `trigger_event` | Dict | No | PydanticUndefined |  |
| `actions_taken` | List | No | PydanticUndefined |  |
| `started_at` | datetime | No | PydanticUndefined |  |
| `completed_at` | Optional | No | None |  |
| `status` | ExecutionStatus | No | ExecutionStatus.PENDING |  |
| `org_id` | str | No | default |  |
| `error_message` | Optional | No | None |  |

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

---

### 38. `POST` `/api/v1/purple-team/exercises/{exercise_id}/steps/{step_index}`

**Summary:** Record detection result for an attack step

**Tags:** purple-team

**Auth:** API Key required

**Description:**

Record whether ALDECI detected a specific attack step. Captures: outcome, detection engine, alert
fired, time to detect. Exercise must be in 'active' status.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Notes |
|------|----|------|----------|-------|
| `exercise_id` | path | str | Yes | — |
| `step_index` | path | int | Yes | — |

**Request Body:** `RecordStepRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `outcome` | str | Yes |  | Step outcome: executed, detected, blocked, missed |
| `detected` | bool | No | False | Was the step detected by ALDECI? |
| `detection_engine` | str | No | none | Which ALDECI engine detected it: siem, edr, ndr, soar, threat_intel, anomaly, manual, none |
| `alert_fired` | bool | No | False | Did an alert fire in the platform? |
| `time_to_detect_seconds` | Optional | No | None | Seconds from attack execution to detection |
| `detection_notes` | str | No |  | Free-text detection notes |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `Dict`

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

**Tags:** purple-team

| `actor` | str | No | blue_team | Who performed the action |
| `description` | str | No |  | Action details |
| `effective` | bool | No | True | Was the action effective? |

**200 OK** — `Dict`

### 44. `POST` `/api/v1/ir/incidents`

**Summary:** Create Incident

**Tags:** Incident Response

**Auth:** API Key required

**Description:**

Create a new incident. Auto-selects the matching NIST 800-61 playbook. Automatically creates
regulatory notification deadlines for applicable frameworks.

**Request Body:** `CreateIncidentRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `title` | str | Yes |  | Short descriptive title |
| `incident_type` | IncidentType | Yes |  | Type of security incident |
| `severity` | IncidentSeverity | Yes |  | Incident severity level |
| `org_id` | str | No | default | Organization identifier |
| `assigned_to` | Optional | No | None | Responder username or team |
| `affected_systems` | List | No | PydanticUndefined | Affected system hostnames/IPs |
| `affected_users` | List | No | PydanticUndefined | Affected user accounts |
| `tags` | List | No | PydanticUndefined | Free-form classification tags |
| `context` | Dict | No | PydanticUndefined | Additional incident context |
| `detected_at` | Optional | No | None | Override detection timestamp (ISO-8601) |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `IncidentResponse`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `playbook_id` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `title` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `incident_type` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `severity` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `status` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `current_phase` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `org_id` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `assigned_to` | Optional | Yes |  |  |
| `affected_systems` | List | Yes |  |  |
| `affected_users` | List | Yes |  |  |
| `tags` | List | Yes |  |  |
| `phase_history` | List | Yes |  |  |
| `context` | Dict | Yes |  |  |
| `created_at` | datetime | Yes |  |  |
| `detected_at` | Optional | Yes |  |  |
| `contained_at` | Optional | Yes |  |  |
| `resolved_at` | Optional | Yes |  |  |
| `updated_at` | datetime | Yes |  |  |
| `current_phase_steps` | List | Yes |  |  |

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

### 53. `POST` `/api/v1/playbooks/execute`

**Summary:** Execute Playbook

**Tags:** IR Playbook Runner

**Auth:** API Key required

**Description:**

Trigger an IR playbook for an incident. Executes all steps synchronously and returns the full
execution record with per-step results. Available playbooks: phishing_response, ransomware_response,
data_exfiltration, unauthorized_access, malware_detected.

**Request Body:** `ExecutePlaybookRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `playbook_id` | str | Yes |  | Playbook ID, e.g. 'phishing_response' |
| `incident` | Dict | Yes |  | Incident context. Supported keys: title, description, severity, org_id, incident_id, affected_assets (list), affected_users (list), attacker_ip, attacker_ips (list), tags (list). |
| `incident_id` | Optional | No | None | Override incident ID |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `ExecutionResponse`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `execution_id` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `playbook_id` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `incident_id` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `started_at` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `completed_at` | Optional | Yes |  |  |
| `status` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `steps_total` | int | Yes |  |  |
| `steps_completed` | int | Yes |  |  |
| `current_step` | Optional | Yes |  |  |
| `step_results` | List | Yes |  |  |

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

### 63. `POST` `/api/v1/anomalies/detect/spike`

**Summary:** Detect spike anomaly

**Tags:** anomaly-detection

**Auth:** API Key required

**Description:**

Run spike detection on a single metric.  A spike is flagged when the latest value exceeds the
rolling mean by more than threshold_pct percent.

**Request Body:** `SpikeDropRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `metric_name` | str | Yes |  | Metric to analyse |
| `threshold_pct` | float | Yes |  | Percentage deviation that triggers the anomaly |
| `org_id` | str | No | default | Organisation ID |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `DetectResponse`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `anomalies_found` | int | Yes |  |  |
| `anomalies` | List | Yes |  |  |

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

mean by more than threshold_pct percent.

### 67. `POST` `/api/v1/anomaly-ml/detect/zscore`

**Summary:** Z-score anomaly detection against behavioral baseline

**Tags:** anomaly-ml

**Auth:** API Key required

**Description:**

Compute z-score for an observed value against the entity's historical baseline.  Returns an anomaly
if |z| > z_threshold (default 3.0 sigma). The baseline is computed from events in the lookback
window.

**Request Body:** `ZScoreRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `entity_id` | str | Yes |  | User or service ID |
| `metric_name` | str | Yes |  | Metric to evaluate |
| `value` | float | Yes |  | Observed value to test |
| `window_days` | int | No | 30 | Baseline window in days |
| `z_threshold` | float | No | 3.0 | Sigma threshold |
| `entity_type` | str | No | user | Entity type |
| `org_id` | str | No | default | Organisation ID |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `ZScoreResponse`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `anomaly_detected` | bool | Yes |  |  |
| `anomaly` | Optional | No | None |  |
| `message` | str | Yes |  |  |

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

---

### 68. `POST` `/api/v1/anomaly-ml/detect/isolation`

**Summary:** Isolation Forest multi-dimensional anomaly scoring

**Tags:** anomaly-ml

**Auth:** API Key required

**Description:**

Score a multi-metric feature vector using a lightweight Isolation Forest.  Trains on historical data
(window_days) and scores the current observation. Score > 0.6 is flagged as anomalous. No sklearn
required.

**Request Body:** `IsolationRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `entity_id` | str | Yes |  | Entity to score |
| `metric_names` | List | Yes |  | Feature metric names |
| `current_values` | List | Yes |  | Current feature vector |
| `window_days` | int | No | 14 | Training window in days |
| `org_id` | str | No | default | Organisation ID |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `IsolationResponse`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `anomaly_detected` | bool | Yes |  |  |
| `isolation_score` | Optional | No | None |  |
| `anomaly` | Optional | No | None |  |
| `message` | str | Yes |  |  |

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

---

### 69. `POST` `/api/v1/anomaly-ml/detect/timeseries`

**Summary:** Time-series anomaly detection (spike/drop/trend/seasonality)

**Tags:** anomaly-ml

**Auth:** API Key required

**Description:**

Analyse time-series data for a metric, detecting: - SPIKE: sudden increase > 3x baseline mean -
DROP: sudden decrease to < 0.2x baseline mean - TREND_UP/DOWN: sustained directional change > 20%
over recent window - SEASONALITY_VIOLATION: z-score > 4.0 vs historical distribution

**Request Body:** `TimeSeriesRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `entity_id` | str | Yes |  | User or service ID |
| `metric_name` | str | Yes |  | Metric to analyse |
| `window_hours` | int | No | 24 | Analysis window in hours |
| `entity_type` | str | No | service | Entity type |
| `org_id` | str | No | default | Organisation ID |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `TimeSeriesResponse`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `anomalies_found` | int | Yes |  |  |
| `anomalies` | List | Yes |  |  |

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

### 70. `GET` `/api/v1/anomaly-ml/ueba/{user_id}`

**Summary:** UEBA composite risk score for a user

**Tags:** anomaly-ml

**Auth:** API Key required

**Description:**

Compute User Entity Behavior Analytics (UEBA) composite risk score (0-100).  Sub-scores: -
login_anomaly_score (0-25): login frequency vs baseline - access_pattern_score (0-25): API call
patterns vs baseline - data_volume_score (0-25): data egress vs baseline - travel_anomaly_score
(0-25): distinct geo_region count (impossible travel)

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Notes |
|------|----|------|----------|-------|
| `user_id` | path | str | Yes | — |
| `org_id` | query | str | No | Organisation ID |
| `window_days` | query | int | No | Lookback window |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `UEBARiskResponse`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `user_risk` | UserRiskScore | Yes |  |  |

**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)

### 75. `POST` `/api/v1/hunt/start`

**Summary:** Start a new hunt

**Tags:** Threat Hunting

**Auth:** API Key required

**Description:**

Start a structured threat hunt workflow for the specified hypothesis.  Creates a new hunt in ACTIVE
status, recording trigger type and context. Returns the hunt ID for subsequent status queries.

**Request Body:** `StartHuntRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `hypothesis_id` | str | Yes |  | ID of the hypothesis to hunt against |
| `org_id` | str | No | default | Organisation ID |
| `analyst` | str | No | system | Analyst name or user ID |
| `trigger_type` | HuntTriggerType | No | HuntTriggerType.MANUAL | What initiated this hunt |
| `trigger_context` | Dict | No | PydanticUndefined | Additional context about the trigger |

### 86. `POST` `/api/v1/hunt/trigger`

**Summary:** Fire an automated hunt trigger

**Tags:** Threat Hunting

**Auth:** API Key required

**Description:**

Fire an automated trigger to initiate a hunt.  Trigger types: new_cve, ioc_match, network_anomaly,
compliance_failure. Automatically selects the best matching hypothesis and starts a hunt. Returns
the started hunt details, or null if no matching hypothesis found.

|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `trigger_type` | HuntTriggerType | Yes |  |  |
| `context` | Dict | No | PydanticUndefined |  |
| `org_id` | str | No | default |  |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `Optional`

| `title` | str | Yes |  | Short vulnerability title |
| `description` | str | Yes |  | Detailed vulnerability description |
| `poc_steps` | str | No |  | Step-by-step proof-of-concept reproduction |
| `impact_assessment` | str | No |  | Reporter's assessment of business impact |
| `attachments` | List | No | PydanticUndefined | Attachment filenames or URLs |
| `org_id` | str | No | default | Organisation ID |

| `attachments` | List | No | PydanticUndefined | Attachment URLs or filenames |
| `status` | SubmissionStatus | No | SubmissionStatus.NEW |  |
| `severity` | Optional | No | None |  |
| `cvss_score` | Optional | No | None |  |
| `duplicate_of` | Optional | No | None | ID of original submission if duplicate |
| `aldeci_finding_id` | Optional | No | None | Linked ALDECI finding ID |
| `reward_id` | Optional | No | None |  |

### 96. `POST` `/api/v1/breach-sim/run`

**Summary:** POST /api/v1/breach-sim/run

**Tags:** breach-simulation

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Run a breach simulation scenario against current defenses.  Executes all attack steps for the chosen
scenario, evaluates which defenses trigger, and returns a scored SimulationResult with gaps and
timing metrics. Result is persisted to SQLite.

**Request Body:** `RunSimulationRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `scenario` | AttackScenario | Yes |  | Attack scenario to simulate |
| `org_id` | str | Yes |  | Organisation identifier |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `SimulationResultResponse`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `scenario` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `steps_executed` | int | Yes |  |  |
| `steps_blocked` | int | Yes |  |  |
| `detection_time_seconds` | float | Yes |  |  |
| `containment_time_seconds` | float | Yes |  |  |
| `data_at_risk` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `defenses_tested` | List | Yes |  |  |
| `gaps_found` | List | Yes |  |  |
| `score` | float | Yes |  |  |
| `org_id` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `simulated_at` | str | Yes |  |  |

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

| `reported_count` | int | Yes |  |  |

### 112. `GET` `/api/v1/phishing/users/susceptibility`

**Summary:** GET /api/v1/phishing/users/susceptibility

**Tags:** phishing-simulation

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Return an individual employee's phishing susceptibility score (0.0–1.0).  Score is calculated as:
clicks / campaigns_targeted. Risk levels: low (<0.25) / medium (0.25–0.5) / high (0.5–0.75) /
critical (≥0.75).

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Notes |
|------|----|------|----------|-------|
| `email` | query | str | Yes | Employee email address |
| `org_id` | query | str | Yes | Organisation identifier |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `Dict`

### 123. `GET` `/api/v1/attack-paths/toxic-combinations`

**Summary:** Detect assets where chained medium findings create critical risk

**Tags:** attack-paths

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Return assets with 3+ vulnerabilities that are internet-exposed.  Each result contains: - asset: the
node metadata - findings: list of CVE IDs present on the asset - combined_risk: amplified risk score
(capped at 100) - attack_chain: external nodes that can directly reach this asset

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Notes |
|------|----|------|----------|-------|
| `org_id` | query | str | No | Organisation ID |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `list`

### 142. `POST` `/api/v1/deception/check`

**Summary:** POST /api/v1/deception/check

**Tags:** deception

**Auth:** API Key required

**Description:**

Check whether a value matches any active canary token.  Called by other engines (connectors,
scanners) to detect credential theft. Returns matched=True and alert details if a canary was
triggered.

**Request Body:** `CheckCanaryRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `token_value` | str | Yes |  | Value to check against known canaries |
| `source_ip` | str | Yes |  | IP address of the accessor |
| `context` | Dict | No | PydanticUndefined | Optional context (user_agent, headers, etc.) |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `CheckCanaryResponse`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `matched` | bool | Yes |  |  |
| `alert` | Optional | No | None |  |
| `message` | str | Yes |  |  |

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

| `role` | str | No |  | User's job role |
| `manager` | str | No |  | Manager's username or ID |
| `status` | str | No | active | active \| suspended \| terminated |
| `last_seen` | Optional | No | None | ISO-8601 datetime of last activity |

### 221. `POST` `/api/v1/xdr/signals`

**Summary:** Ingest a security signal

**Tags:** xdr

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Ingest a cross-domain security signal and trigger auto-correlation.

**Request Body:** `IngestSignalRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `source_type` | str | No | endpoint | endpoint/network/cloud/identity/email/application/threat_intel |
| `source_system` | str | No |  |  |
| `signal_type` | str | No | anomaly | malware/lateral_movement/credential_theft/exfiltration/c2/anomaly/policy_violation |
| `severity` | str | No | medium | critical/high/medium/low/info |
| `entity_id` | str | No |  | IP, hostname, username, file hash, etc. |
| `entity_type` | str | No | host | host/ip/user/file/process/domain |
| `raw_data` | Dict | No | PydanticUndefined |  |
| `confidence` | float | No | 0.8 |  |
| `ingested_at` | Optional | No | None |  |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `Dict`

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

### 250. `POST` `/api/v1/connectors/falcon/ingest`

**Summary:** POST /api/v1/connectors/falcon/ingest

**Tags:** CrowdStrike Falcon Connector

**Auth:** API Key required

**Description:**

Ingest a Falcon Detection.Created JSON dump.  Provide either ``events`` (parsed list) or
``json_text`` (raw text). Returns counts (ingested/failed/findings_recorded/edr_events/
correlation_events) and the list of detection_ids absorbed.

**Request Body:** `FalconIngestRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

### 361. `POST` `/api/v1/siem/ingest`

**Summary:** POST /api/v1/siem/ingest

**Tags:** siem-integration

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Parse and ingest a raw syslog or CEF log line as a SIEM event.  Accepts: - Syslog RFC 3164:
``<PRI>Mmm DD HH:MM:SS hostname tag: message`` - Syslog RFC 5424: ``<PRI>VERSION TIMESTAMP HOSTNAME
APP-NAME PROCID MSGID ...`` - CEF: ``CEF:0|Vendor|Product|Version|SigID|Name|Severity|extensions`` -
format="auto" (default) detects CEF by presence of "CEF:" prefix.  Returns the normalised, stored
event record including parsed fields.

**Request Body:** `RawIngestIn`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `org_id` | str | No | default |  |
| `raw` | str | Yes |  | Raw syslog (RFC 3164/5424) or CEF log line |
| `format` | str | No | auto | 'syslog' \| 'cef' \| 'auto' (default — auto-detected from content) |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `Dict`

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

---

### 381. `POST` `/api/v1/connectors/siem/ingest`

**Summary:** POST /api/v1/connectors/siem/ingest

**Tags:** siem-connector

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Parse a SIEM payload and mirror to SIEM, correlation, and findings engines.  Accepts: - Splunk HEC
envelope (single or NDJSON batch) - Datadog Logs API JSON - Microsoft Sentinel KQL JSON result -
Elasticsearch _bulk NDJSON - Wazuh alerts.json record(s) - Suricata eve.json record(s) - CEF lines
(used by QRadar, ArcSight) - RFC 3164/5424 syslog lines - Generic JSON-Lines  With format=auto
(default), the adapter is auto-detected.

**Request Body:** `IngestRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `org_id` | str | No | default | Tenant identifier |
| `payload` | Any | Yes |  | Raw SIEM payload (str, dict, or list) |
| `format` | str | No | auto | Adapter key — one of: splunk_hec \| datadog \| sentinel_kql \| elk_bulk \| wazuh_alert \| suricata_eve \| cef \| syslog \| json_lines \| auto |
| `source_id` | Optional | No | None | Optional SIEM source ID |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `Dict`

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

---

### 382. `POST` `/api/v1/connectors/siem/generate`

**Summary:** POST /api/v1/connectors/siem/generate

**Tags:** siem-connector

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Generate realistic SIEM fixture events without ingesting them.  Returns ``tenants *
events_per_tenant`` synthetic SIEM payloads spanning Splunk HEC, Datadog, Sentinel KQL, ELK, Wazuh,
CEF, syslog, Suricata. Useful for connector smoke testing without DB writes.

**Request Body:** `GenerateRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `tenants` | int | No | 15 | Number of tenants to generate for |
| `events_per_tenant` | int | No | 14 | Events per tenant (10-20 typical) |
| `seed` | int | No | 1337 | RNG seed for deterministic output |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `Dict`

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

---

### 383. `POST` `/api/v1/connectors/siem/tail`

**Summary:** POST /api/v1/connectors/siem/tail

**Tags:** siem-connector

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Tail real log files on disk and ingest new bytes since last call.  Designed for /var/log/system.log,
ALDECI's own structlog JSON output, or any other newline-delimited log file. Per-file byte cursors
persist in ``.aldeci/siem_tail_cursors.json`` so subsequent calls only ingest *new* content (real
incremental log tailing, not re-ingest).  Each file's content is auto-detected (JSON-leading →
json_lines, else syslog), parsed by the matching adapter, and mirrored into the SIEM, correlation,
and findings engines.

**Request Body:** `TailRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `org_id` | str | No | default | Tenant identifier |
| `file_paths` | List | Yes |  | Absolute paths to log files to tail (e.g. /var/log/system.log). |
| `format` | str | No | auto | Adapter key per file (auto picks json_lines for JSON-leading lines, syslog otherwise). |
| `max_bytes_per_file` | int | No | 1048576 |  |
| `max_lines_per_file` | int | No | 5000 |  |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `Dict`

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

---

### 384. `POST` `/api/v1/connectors/siem/generate-and-ingest`

**Summary:** POST /api/v1/connectors/siem/generate-and-ingest

**Tags:** siem-connector

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Generate fixture events and ingest them into all three engines.  Used by E2E pipeline tests to seed
realistic, multi-tenant, multi-format SIEM data. Returns per-format and per-tenant counts plus
aggregate totals.

**Request Body:** `GenerateRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `tenants` | int | No | 15 | Number of tenants to generate for |
| `events_per_tenant` | int | No | 14 | Events per tenant (10-20 typical) |
| `seed` | int | No | 1337 | RNG seed for deterministic output |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `Dict`

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

---

|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `org_id` | str | No | default | Organisation ID |
| `hunt_id` | str | Yes |  | Associated hunt ID |
| `endpoint_id` | str | No |  | Endpoint where finding was detected |
| `finding_type` | str | No | malware | Finding type |
| `severity` | str | No | medium | Severity: critical/high/medium/low |
| `process_name` | str | No |  | Process name |
| `command_line` | str | No |  | Command line observed |
| `file_path` | str | No |  | File path involved |
| `status` | str | No | new | Finding status |
| `detected_at` | Optional | No | None | ISO-8601 detection timestamp |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `Dict`

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

### 571. `POST` `/api/v1/alert-triage/bulk-triage`

**Summary:** POST /api/v1/alert-triage/bulk-triage

**Tags:** Alert Triage

**Auth:** API Key required

**Description:**

Apply the same triage action to multiple alerts at once.  Accepts either ``alert_ids`` (list) or
``alert_id`` (single string). ``org_id`` may be provided as a query parameter or in the request
body. Valid actions: acknowledge, ack, resolve, false_positive, escalate.  Validation contract:   *
422 — request shape invalid (missing IDs, empty list, bad enum, missing org).   * 403 — at least one
ID belongs to a different org (cross-tenant attempt).   * 404 — at least one ID does not exist
anywhere.   * 200 — all IDs validated and updated atomically.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Notes |
|------|----|------|----------|-------|
| `org_id` | query | Optional | No | Organization ID |

**Request Body:** `BulkTriageRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `alert_ids` | Optional | No | None | List of alert IDs to action (1-500 entries) |
| `alert_id` | Optional | No | None | Single alert ID (convenience alias for alert_ids) |
| `action` | Literal | Yes |  | acknowledge \| ack \| resolve \| false_positive \| escalate |
| `org_id` | Optional | No | None | Organization ID (can also be passed as query param) |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `Dict`

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

---

### 575. `POST` `/api/v1/alert-triage/investigate/{alert_id}`

**Summary:** POST /api/v1/alert-triage/investigate/{alert_id}

**Tags:** Alert Triage

**Auth:** API Key required

**Description:**

SOC analyst investigation endpoint.  Correlates an alert across all security domains and returns: -
The alert record with full metadata - Related alerts from the same source/severity in last 24 h -
Affected assets extracted from raw_alert_json (host, ip, user) - Incident history matching those
assets - IOC summary (IPs, domains, hashes) parsed from raw payload - TrustGraph GraphRAG cross-
domain context - Recommended IR playbook based on source/severity heuristics

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Notes |
|------|----|------|----------|-------|
| `alert_id` | path | str | Yes | — |
| `org_id` | query | str | Yes | Organization ID |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `Dict`

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

---

### 585. `POST` `/api/v1/threat-vectors/import-mitre`

**Summary:** POST /api/v1/threat-vectors/import-mitre

**Tags:** Threat Vector Analysis

**Auth:** API Key required

**Description:**

Import MITRE ATT&CK techniques from STIX 2.1 bundle into the local DB.  Downloads the enterprise-
attack bundle from MITRE CTI GitHub (~10 MB), extracts all attack-pattern objects (techniques + sub-
techniques), and upserts them into data/mitre_attack.db.  Returns
technique/subtechnique/tactic/platform counts.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Notes |
|------|----|------|----------|-------|
| `org_id` | query | str | Yes | Organization ID |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `Dict`

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

---

### 652. `POST` `/api/v1/actor-tracking/actors/import-mitre`

**Summary:** Import threat actors from public MITRE ATT&CK enterprise dataset

**Tags:** Threat Actor Tracking

**Auth:** API Key required

**Description:**

Pull intrusion-set objects from MITRE ATT&CK STIX bundle and register each as a tracked actor for
this org. Idempotent: dedupes on actor_name. Returns import summary + sample records.  Source:
https://github.com/mitre/cti (Apache-2.0 licensed public data).

**Request Body:** `ImportMitreModel`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `org_id` | str | No | default |  |
| `limit` | Optional | No | None | Cap number of actors imported (None = all ~150 MITRE groups) |
| `cached_path` | Optional | No | None | Optional local path to cached enterprise-attack.json (skips network fetch) |

**Responses:**


**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

---

**Summary:** POST /api/v1/alert-enrichment/alerts

**Tags:** Alert Enrichment

**Auth:** API Key required

**Description:**

Submit an alert for enrichment. Deduplicates on alert_id per org.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Notes |
|------|----|------|----------|-------|
| `org_id` | query | str | Yes | Organization ID |

**Request Body:** `SubmitAlertRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `alert_id` | str | Yes |  | Unique alert identifier from source system |
| `alert_source` | str | Yes |  | Source system name (e.g. SIEM, EDR) |
| `severity` | str | No | medium | critical \| high \| medium \| low |
| `raw_indicator` | str | Yes |  | Raw indicator value to enrich |
| `indicator_type` | str | No | ip | ip \| domain \| url \| hash \| email \| user \| process \| registry |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `Dict`

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

| `priority` | int | No | 1 | Priority (lower = higher priority) |

| Name | In | Type | Required | Notes |

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |

| `threat_category` | str | Yes |  | Threat category being hunted |
| `mitre_technique` | str | No |  | MITRE ATT&CK technique ID |
| `hypothesis` | str | No |  | Primary hunt hypothesis |
| `data_sources` | Optional | No | None | Data sources required |

### 759. `POST` `/api/v1/hunting-playbooks/import-sigma`

**Summary:** POST /api/v1/hunting-playbooks/import-sigma

**Tags:** Threat Hunting Playbooks

**Auth:** API Key required

**Description:**

Import detection rules from SigmaHQ master branch into sigmahq_rules.db.  Downloads
https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/archive/refs/heads/master.tar.gz, parses all YAML rules under
rules/ (skipping deprecated/unsupported/tests), and upserts them by UUID.  Returns a summary with
rule count by level and platform.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Notes |
|------|----|------|----------|-------|
| `org_id` | query | str | No | default |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `Dict`

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

---

| `subject` | str | Yes |  | Communication subject (required) |
| `body` | str | Yes |  | Communication body content (required) |
| `audience` | str | No | internal | internal \| external \| executive \| technical \| customer \| all |
| `severity` | str | No | medium | critical \| high \| medium \| low |
| `comm_status` | str | No | draft | draft \| sent \| delivered \| failed |
| `scheduled_at` | Optional | No | None | Scheduled send time (ISO 8601) |
| `author` | Optional | No | None | Author name or ID |

| `dread_score` | Optional | No | None | DREAD risk score |
| `affected_component` | str | Yes |  | System component at risk |
| `mitigations` | List | No | PydanticUndefined | Mitigation controls applied |
| `status` | ThreatStatus | No | ThreatStatus.IDENTIFIED | Current threat status |
| `org_id` | str | No | default | Organisation identifier |

### 785. `POST` `/api/v1/threat-models/threats/{threat_id}/score`

**Summary:** POST /api/v1/threat-models/threats/{threat_id}/score

**Tags:** threat-modeling

**Auth:** API Key required

**Description:**

Calculate and store DREAD score for a threat.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Notes |
|------|----|------|----------|-------|
| `threat_id` | path | str | Yes | — |

**Request Body:** `ScoreThreatRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `damage` | int | Yes |  |  |
| `reproducibility` | int | Yes |  |  |
| `exploitability` | int | Yes |  |  |
| `affected_users` | int | Yes |  |  |
| `discoverability` | int | Yes |  |  |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `DREADScore`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `damage` | int | Yes |  | Damage potential if exploited (1-10) |
| `reproducibility` | int | Yes |  | How easily can the attack be reproduced (1-10) |
| `exploitability` | int | Yes |  | Skill/effort required to exploit (1-10) |
| `affected_users` | int | Yes |  | Number of users affected (1-10) |
| `discoverability` | int | Yes |  | How easy is it to discover the vulnerability (1-10) |
| `total` | float | No | 0.0 | Computed mean of all five dimensions |

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

### 811. `POST` `/api/v1/ir/incidents`

**Summary:** Create Incident

**Tags:** Incident Response

**Auth:** API Key required

**Description:**

Create a new incident. Auto-selects the matching NIST 800-61 playbook. Automatically creates
regulatory notification deadlines for applicable frameworks.

**Request Body:** `CreateIncidentRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `title` | str | Yes |  | Short descriptive title |
| `incident_type` | IncidentType | Yes |  | Type of security incident |
| `severity` | IncidentSeverity | Yes |  | Incident severity level |
| `org_id` | str | No | default | Organization identifier |
| `assigned_to` | Optional | No | None | Responder username or team |
| `affected_systems` | List | No | PydanticUndefined | Affected system hostnames/IPs |
| `affected_users` | List | No | PydanticUndefined | Affected user accounts |
| `tags` | List | No | PydanticUndefined | Free-form classification tags |
| `context` | Dict | No | PydanticUndefined | Additional incident context |
| `detected_at` | Optional | No | None | Override detection timestamp (ISO-8601) |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `IncidentResponse`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `playbook_id` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `title` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `incident_type` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `severity` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `status` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `current_phase` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `org_id` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `assigned_to` | Optional | Yes |  |  |
| `affected_systems` | List | Yes |  |  |
| `affected_users` | List | Yes |  |  |
| `tags` | List | Yes |  |  |
| `phase_history` | List | Yes |  |  |
| `context` | Dict | Yes |  |  |
| `created_at` | datetime | Yes |  |  |
| `detected_at` | Optional | Yes |  |  |
| `contained_at` | Optional | Yes |  |  |
| `resolved_at` | Optional | Yes |  |  |
| `updated_at` | datetime | Yes |  |  |
| `current_phase_steps` | List | Yes |  |  |

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)

### 813. `POST` `/api/v1/ir/incidents/{incident_id}/advance`

**Summary:** Advance Incident Phase

**Tags:** Incident Response

**Auth:** API Key required

**Description:**

Advance incident to the next NIST 800-61 phase: Detection & Analysis → Containment → Eradication →
Recovery → Lessons Learned → Closed.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Notes |
|------|----|------|----------|-------|
| `incident_id` | path | str | Yes | — |
| `org_id` | query | str | No | Organization ID |

**Request Body:** `AdvancePhaseRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `approved_by` | Optional | No | None | Approver username (required for gated phases) |
| `notes` | str | No |  | Phase completion notes |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `IncidentResponse`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `playbook_id` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `title` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `incident_type` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `severity` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `status` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `current_phase` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `org_id` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `assigned_to` | Optional | Yes |  |  |
| `affected_systems` | List | Yes |  |  |
| `affected_users` | List | Yes |  |  |
| `tags` | List | Yes |  |  |
| `phase_history` | List | Yes |  |  |
| `context` | Dict | Yes |  |  |
| `created_at` | datetime | Yes |  |  |
| `detected_at` | Optional | Yes |  |  |
| `contained_at` | Optional | Yes |  |  |
| `resolved_at` | Optional | Yes |  |  |
| `updated_at` | datetime | Yes |  |  |
| `current_phase_steps` | List | Yes |  |  |

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)

### 816. `POST` `/api/v1/ir/incidents/{incident_id}/evidence`

**Summary:** Add Evidence

**Tags:** Incident Response

**Auth:** API Key required

**Description:**

Add a piece of evidence to the incident with cryptographic chain-of-custody.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Notes |
|------|----|------|----------|-------|
| `incident_id` | path | str | Yes | — |
| `org_id` | query | str | No | Organization ID |

**Request Body:** `AddEvidenceRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `collector_id` | str | Yes |  | ID of the collector (user, tool, or system) |
| `evidence_type` | str | Yes |  | Evidence type: log, screenshot, pcap, image, etc. |
| `description` | str | Yes |  | Human-readable description of this evidence |
| `raw_content` | str | Yes |  | Raw evidence content (text, base64 for binary) |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `EvidenceResponse`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `incident_id` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `collector_id` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `evidence_type` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `description` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `sha256_hash` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `collected_at` | datetime | Yes |  |  |
| `previous_hash` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `chain_sequence` | int | Yes |  |  |
| `chain_valid` | bool | No | True |  |

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)

**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)

### 820. `POST` `/api/v1/playbooks/execute`

**Summary:** Execute Playbook

**Tags:** IR Playbook Runner

**Auth:** API Key required

**Description:**

Trigger an IR playbook for an incident. Executes all steps synchronously and returns the full
execution record with per-step results. Available playbooks: phishing_response, ransomware_response,
data_exfiltration, unauthorized_access, malware_detected.

**Request Body:** `ExecutePlaybookRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `playbook_id` | str | Yes |  | Playbook ID, e.g. 'phishing_response' |
| `incident` | Dict | Yes |  | Incident context. Supported keys: title, description, severity, org_id, incident_id, affected_assets (list), affected_users (list), attacker_ip, attacker_ips (list), tags (list). |
| `incident_id` | Optional | No | None | Override incident ID |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `ExecutionResponse`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `execution_id` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `playbook_id` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `incident_id` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `started_at` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `completed_at` | Optional | Yes |  |  |
| `status` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `steps_total` | int | Yes |  |  |
| `steps_completed` | int | Yes |  |  |
| `current_step` | Optional | Yes |  |  |
| `step_results` | List | Yes |  |  |

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

---

### 859. `POST` `/api/v1/soar/playbooks`

**Summary:** Create a new SOAR playbook

**Tags:** soar

**Auth:** API Key required

**Description:**

Define an automated response playbook.  The playbook will fire when an event matching `trigger` (and
optional `conditions`) is submitted to the /trigger endpoint.

**Request Body:** `CreatePlaybookRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `name` | str | Yes |  | Human-readable playbook name |
| `trigger` | PlaybookTrigger | Yes |  | Event type that fires this playbook |
| `actions` | List | Yes |  | Ordered list of action definitions |
| `conditions` | Dict | No | PydanticUndefined | Optional key/value conditions that must match the event |
| `enabled` | bool | No | True | Whether the playbook is active |
| `org_id` | str | No | default | Organisation ID |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `SOARPlaybook`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | str | No | PydanticUndefined |  |
| `name` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `trigger` | PlaybookTrigger | Yes |  |  |
| `conditions` | Dict | No | PydanticUndefined |  |
| `actions` | List | No | PydanticUndefined |  |
| `enabled` | bool | No | True |  |
| `execution_count` | int | No | 0 |  |
| `avg_response_seconds` | float | No | 0.0 |  |
| `org_id` | str | No | default |  |
| `created_at` | datetime | No | PydanticUndefined |  |
| `updated_at` | datetime | No | PydanticUndefined |  |

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

---

### 862. `POST` `/api/v1/soar/trigger`

**Summary:** Evaluate an event and fire matching playbooks

**Tags:** soar

**Auth:** API Key required

**Description:**

Submit a security event for automated response.  Matches the event against all enabled playbooks
with the given trigger type and condition set. Returns execution records for every playbook that
fired.

**Request Body:** `TriggerEventRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `trigger` | PlaybookTrigger | Yes |  | Event trigger type |
| `org_id` | str | No | default | Organisation ID |
| `event_data` | Dict | No | PydanticUndefined | Additional event context |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `List`

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

---

### 863. `POST` `/api/v1/soar/playbooks/{playbook_id}/execute`

**Summary:** Manually execute a SOAR playbook

**Tags:** soar

**Auth:** API Key required

**Description:**

Run a playbook immediately, bypassing trigger/condition evaluation.  Useful for manual incident
response or testing playbook actions. Returns 404 if the playbook does not exist, 422 if it is
disabled.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Notes |
|------|----|------|----------|-------|
| `playbook_id` | path | str | Yes | — |

**Request Body:** `ExecutePlaybookRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `context` | Dict | No | PydanticUndefined | Execution context passed to actions |
| `org_id` | str | No | default | Organisation ID |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `SOARExecution`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | str | No | PydanticUndefined |  |
| `playbook_id` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `trigger_event` | Dict | No | PydanticUndefined |  |
| `actions_taken` | List | No | PydanticUndefined |  |
| `started_at` | datetime | No | PydanticUndefined |  |
| `completed_at` | Optional | No | None |  |
| `status` | ExecutionStatus | No | ExecutionStatus.PENDING |  |
| `org_id` | str | No | default |  |
| `error_message` | Optional | No | None |  |

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

---

### 866. `GET` `/api/v1/soar/mttr`

**Summary:** Mean Time To Respond (MTTR)

**Tags:** soar

**Auth:** API Key required

**Description:**

Compute MTTR from all completed SOAR executions for the org.  Returns seconds and minutes. Returns
0.0 if no executions have completed.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Notes |
|------|----|------|----------|-------|
| `org_id` | query | str | No | Organisation ID |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `MTTRResponse`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `org_id` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `mttr_seconds` | float | Yes |  |  |
| `mttr_minutes` | float | Yes |  |  |

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

### 868. `POST` `/api/v1/ir/incidents`

**Summary:** Create Incident

**Tags:** Incident Response

**Auth:** API Key required

**Description:**

Create a new incident. Auto-selects the matching NIST 800-61 playbook. Automatically creates
regulatory notification deadlines for applicable frameworks.

**Request Body:** `CreateIncidentRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `title` | str | Yes |  | Short descriptive title |
| `incident_type` | IncidentType | Yes |  | Type of security incident |
| `severity` | IncidentSeverity | Yes |  | Incident severity level |
| `org_id` | str | No | default | Organization identifier |
| `assigned_to` | Optional | No | None | Responder username or team |
| `affected_systems` | List | No | PydanticUndefined | Affected system hostnames/IPs |
| `affected_users` | List | No | PydanticUndefined | Affected user accounts |
| `tags` | List | No | PydanticUndefined | Free-form classification tags |
| `context` | Dict | No | PydanticUndefined | Additional incident context |
| `detected_at` | Optional | No | None | Override detection timestamp (ISO-8601) |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `IncidentResponse`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `playbook_id` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `title` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `incident_type` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `severity` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `status` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `current_phase` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `org_id` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `assigned_to` | Optional | Yes |  |  |
| `affected_systems` | List | Yes |  |  |
| `affected_users` | List | Yes |  |  |
| `tags` | List | Yes |  |  |
| `phase_history` | List | Yes |  |  |
| `context` | Dict | Yes |  |  |
| `created_at` | datetime | Yes |  |  |
| `detected_at` | Optional | Yes |  |  |
| `contained_at` | Optional | Yes |  |  |
| `resolved_at` | Optional | Yes |  |  |
| `updated_at` | datetime | Yes |  |  |
| `current_phase_steps` | List | Yes |  |  |

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

### 870. `POST` `/api/v1/ir/incidents/{incident_id}/advance`

**Summary:** Advance Incident Phase

**Tags:** Incident Response

**Auth:** API Key required

**Description:**

Advance incident to the next NIST 800-61 phase: Detection & Analysis → Containment → Eradication →
Recovery → Lessons Learned → Closed.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Notes |
|------|----|------|----------|-------|
| `incident_id` | path | str | Yes | — |
| `org_id` | query | str | No | Organization ID |

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

| `notes` | str | No |  | Phase completion notes |

**Responses:**

| `playbook_id` | str | Yes |  |  |

### 873. `POST` `/api/v1/ir/incidents/{incident_id}/evidence`

**Summary:** Add Evidence

**Tags:** Incident Response

**Auth:** API Key required

**Description:**

Add a piece of evidence to the incident with cryptographic chain-of-custody.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Notes |
|------|----|------|----------|-------|
| `incident_id` | path | str | Yes | — |
| `org_id` | query | str | No | Organization ID |

**Request Body:** `AddEvidenceRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `collector_id` | str | Yes |  | ID of the collector (user, tool, or system) |
| `evidence_type` | str | Yes |  | Evidence type: log, screenshot, pcap, image, etc. |
| `description` | str | Yes |  | Human-readable description of this evidence |
| `raw_content` | str | Yes |  | Raw evidence content (text, base64 for binary) |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `EvidenceResponse`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `incident_id` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `collector_id` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `evidence_type` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `description` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `sha256_hash` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `collected_at` | datetime | Yes |  |  |
| `previous_hash` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `chain_sequence` | int | Yes |  |  |
| `chain_valid` | bool | No | True |  |

**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)

### 877. `POST` `/api/v1/playbooks/execute`

**Summary:** Execute Playbook

**Tags:** IR Playbook Runner

**Auth:** API Key required

**Description:**

Trigger an IR playbook for an incident. Executes all steps synchronously and returns the full
execution record with per-step results. Available playbooks: phishing_response, ransomware_response,
data_exfiltration, unauthorized_access, malware_detected.

**Request Body:** `ExecutePlaybookRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `playbook_id` | str | Yes |  | Playbook ID, e.g. 'phishing_response' |
| `incident` | Dict | Yes |  | Incident context. Supported keys: title, description, severity, org_id, incident_id, affected_assets (list), affected_users (list), attacker_ip, attacker_ips (list), tags (list). |
| `incident_id` | Optional | No | None | Override incident ID |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `ExecutionResponse`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `execution_id` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `playbook_id` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `incident_id` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `started_at` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `completed_at` | Optional | Yes |  |  |
| `status` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `steps_total` | int | Yes |  |  |
| `steps_completed` | int | Yes |  |  |
| `current_step` | Optional | Yes |  |  |
| `step_results` | List | Yes |  |  |

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

**Tags:** threat-intel

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

Return the most recently cached CVEs enriched with EPSS scores.  CVEs are served from the local
SQLite cache. Call ``/refresh`` to pull the latest data from NVD / EPSS / CISA KEV.

| Name | In | Type | Required | Notes |
|------|----|------|----------|-------|
| `limit` | query | int | No | Max CVEs to return |

### 892. `GET` `/api/v1/threat-intel/kev`

**Summary:** GET /api/v1/threat-intel/kev

**Tags:** threat-intel

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Return the current CISA Known Exploited Vulnerabilities catalog from cache.  The catalog is
refreshed on each call to ``/refresh``.

**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)

### 893. `POST` `/api/v1/threat-intel/refresh`

**Summary:** POST /api/v1/threat-intel/refresh

**Tags:** threat-intel

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Trigger a fresh pull from NVD, EPSS, and CISA KEV.  This is a synchronous operation — it blocks
until all feeds are fetched and cached. For large date ranges this may take up to 60 seconds due to
NVD rate limits.

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `Dict`

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

---

**Tags:** threat-intel

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

List/search IOCs from local feed caches.  Currently returns C2 IPs from the Feodo blocklist.
Supports optional substring search and type filtering.

|------|----|------|----------|-------|

| `search` | query | Optional | No | Substring search on IOC value |
| `limit` | query | int | No | 100 |
| `offset` | query | int | No | 0 |

blocklist for C2 classification.

### 910. `POST` `/api/v1/mpte/requests`

**Summary:** POST /api/v1/mpte/requests

**Tags:** mpte

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Create a new pen test request with automated testing.  Creates the request immediately and runs
verification in the background. If the external MPTE service is unreachable, falls back to the local
micro-pentest engine (cve_tester + real_scanner).  Security: Validates target_url for SSRF, enforces
concurrent scan limit.

**Request Body:** `CreatePenTestRequestModel`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `finding_id` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `target_url` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `vulnerability_type` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `test_case` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `priority` | str | No | medium |  |
| `auto_verify` | bool | No | True |  |

**Responses:**


**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

---

### 925. `POST` `/api/v1/mpte/scan/comprehensive`

**Summary:** POST /api/v1/mpte/scan/comprehensive

**Tags:** mpte

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Run comprehensive multi-vector security scan using BUILT-IN scanner.  This performs REAL HTTP-based
security checks against the target: - Security header analysis - SSL/TLS certificate validation -
CORS misconfiguration detection - Cookie security analysis - Server information disclosure -
Technology fingerprinting - HTTP method enumeration - Port scanning - Common path discovery

**Request Body:** `ComprehensiveScanModel`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `target` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `scan_types` | Optional | No | None |  |
| `scan_type` | Optional | No | comprehensive |  |
| `depth` | Optional | No | standard |  |

**Responses:**


**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

---

### 926. `GET` `/api/v1/mpte/findings/{finding_id}/exploitability`

**Summary:** GET /api/v1/mpte/findings/{finding_id}/exploitability

**Tags:** mpte

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Get exploitability assessment for a finding.  Security hardening (2026-03-03): - finding_id
validated: alphanumeric + hyphens/underscores/dots/colons only - Max 256 chars to prevent DoS via
huge path params - Error logging uses type(e).__name__ only

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Notes |
|------|----|------|----------|-------|
| `finding_id` | path | str | Yes | — |

**Responses:**


**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

### 932. `POST` `/api/v1/micro-pentest/run`

**Summary:** POST /api/v1/micro-pentest/run

**Tags:** micro-pentest

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Run micro penetration tests for selected CVEs using MPTE.  This endpoint initiates a micro
penetration test flow in MPTE to verify the exploitability of specified CVEs against target URLs.
Args:     request: The test request containing CVE IDs and target URLs  Returns:     Response with
flow_id if successful, or error details if failed  Raises:     HTTPException: If validation fails or
MPTE is unavailable

**Request Body:** `RunMicroPentestRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `cve_ids` | List | No | PydanticUndefined | List of CVE IDs to test (empty = general vulnerability scan) |
| `target_urls` | List | Yes |  | List of target URLs to test against |
| `context` | Optional | No | None | Optional context information for the test |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `RunMicroPentestResponse`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `status` | str | Yes |  | Status of the test (started, completed, error) |
| `flow_id` | Optional | No | None | MPTE flow ID if started |
| `cve_ids` | List | No | PydanticUndefined | CVE IDs being tested |
| `target_urls` | List | No | PydanticUndefined | Target URLs being tested |
| `message` | str | No |  | Status message |
| `error` | Optional | No | None | Error message if failed |
| `cve_results` | Optional | No | None | Per-CVE test results with vulnerability status, confidence, evidence, and remediation |
| `findings` | Optional | No | None | All vulnerability findings from CVE tests and general security scanning |
| `scan_metadata` | Optional | No | None | Scan metadata including engine used, timing, and statistics |

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

---

### 933. `GET` `/api/v1/micro-pentest/status/{flow_id}`

**Summary:** GET /api/v1/micro-pentest/status/{flow_id}

**Tags:** micro-pentest

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Get status of a micro penetration test flow.  Args:     flow_id: The MPTE flow ID  Returns:
Current status and progress of the test  Raises:     HTTPException: If flow not found or MPTE is
unavailable

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Notes |
|------|----|------|----------|-------|
| `flow_id` | path | int | Yes | — |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `MicroPentestStatusResponse`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `flow_id` | int | Yes |  | MPTE flow ID |
| `status` | str | Yes |  | Current status of the test |
| `progress` | int | No | 0 | Progress percentage (0-100) |
| `tasks` | List | No | PydanticUndefined | List of tasks |
| `error` | Optional | No | None | Error message if failed |

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

---

### 934. `POST` `/api/v1/micro-pentest/batch`

**Summary:** POST /api/v1/micro-pentest/batch

**Tags:** micro-pentest

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Run multiple micro penetration tests in parallel.  This endpoint allows running multiple micro
penetration tests concurrently, each with its own set of CVE IDs and target URLs.  Args:
request: The batch request containing multiple test configurations  Returns:     Batch results with
individual test outcomes  Raises:     HTTPException: If validation fails

**Request Body:** `BatchMicroPentestRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `test_configs` | List | Yes |  | List of test configurations |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `BatchMicroPentestResponse`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `status` | str | Yes |  | Overall batch status |
| `total` | int | Yes |  | Total number of tests |
| `successful` | int | Yes |  | Number of successful tests |
| `failed` | int | Yes |  | Number of failed tests |
| `results` | List | No | PydanticUndefined | Individual results |
| `error` | Optional | No | None | Error message if batch failed |

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

---

### 935. `POST` `/api/v1/micro-pentest/enterprise/scan`

**Summary:** POST /api/v1/micro-pentest/enterprise/scan

**Tags:** micro-pentest

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Run an enterprise micro penetration test scan.  This endpoint runs a comprehensive 8-phase security
scan: 1. Initialization - Set up scan environment 2. Reconnaissance - Gather target information 3.
Threat Modeling - Map threats to MITRE ATT&CK 4. Vulnerability Scanning - Detect vulnerabilities 5.
Exploitation - Verify exploitability with PoC 6. Compliance Validation - Check against frameworks 7.
Risk Scoring - Calculate risk scores 8. Attack Path Generation - Chain findings into attack paths

**Request Body:** `EnterpriseScanRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `name` | str | Yes |  | Name of the scan |
| `attack_surface` | AttackSurfaceRequest | Yes |  | Attack surface |
| `threat_model` | ThreatModelRequest | Yes |  | Threat model |
| `scan_mode` | str | No | active | Scan mode |
| `timeout_seconds` | int | No | 300 | Timeout |
| `stop_on_critical` | bool | No | True | Stop on critical finding |
| `include_proof_of_concept` | bool | No | True | Include PoC |
| `tenant_id` | str | No | default | Tenant ID |
| `organization_id` | str | No | default | Organization ID |
| `tags` | List | No | PydanticUndefined | Tags |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `dict`

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

---

### 955. `POST` `/api/v1/mpte-orchestrator/remediation`

**Summary:** POST /api/v1/mpte-orchestrator/remediation

**Tags:** mpte-orchestrator

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Generate remediation guidance using AutoFixEngine and FeedsService.

**Request Body:** `RemediationRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `cve_id` | str | Yes |  | CVE identifier |

### 958. `POST` `/api/v1/attack-paths/gnn/analyze`

**Summary:** Full attack surface analysis

**Tags:** GNN Attack Paths

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Analyze attack surface using GNN-based prediction.  Builds a security graph, identifies entry points
and high-value targets, finds attack paths, propagates risk, and identifies critical nodes.

**Request Body:** `AttackSurfaceRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `infrastructure` | List | Yes |  |  |
| `connections` | List | Yes |  |  |
| `vulnerabilities` | List | No | PydanticUndefined |  |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `Dict`

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

**Summary:** POST /api/v1/connectors/dast/scan

**Tags:** connectors, dast

**Auth:** API Key required

**Description:**

Execute the requested scanners and return a run summary.

**Request Body:** `DastScanRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `org_id` | str | Yes |  | Tenant ID |
| `target` | str | Yes |  | Target URL (http/https). Example: http://localhost:3001 |
| `scanners` | List | No | PydanticUndefined | Subset of {'nuclei','zap'} to run. |
| `mirror_to_bug_bounty` | bool | No | True | If true, high/critical findings are forwarded into the bug-bounty workflow. |
| `timeout_per_scanner` | int | No | 600 | Per-scanner hard timeout in seconds (30..3600). |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `dict`

**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error
